name: Spritzgeback (Spritz Cookies)
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Almond extract or lemon extract
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and confectioners' sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Beat in egg and egg yolk, then stir in almond or lemon extract.
3. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture.
5. Chill the dough for 30 minutes.
6. Press 1/4 of the dough into a cookie press. Keep the remaining dough chilled.
7. Shape cookies onto a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C (400°F) for 7 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Allow cookies to cool on wire racks.
10. Store cooled cookies in an airtight container. Makes approximately 4 dozen cookies.
